<!-- SPECKIT START -->
tools :
  jpos as switch 
  fastapi as backend
  react as frontend
  database as oracle
  data warehouse as postgres database
  ETL as python scripts & airflow & pyspark
  frontend framework as vite
  frontend theme as ant design with UI5 web components touch theme to give SAP ERP look and feel and bank user experience & T42 system look and feel.
  all archticture should be dockerized and orchestrated with docker compose
  all architecture should be cloud native and should be able to run on premises
  all architecture should be compliant with security best practices and should be able to run in a secure environment and PCI compliant environment
  comminutation between frontend and backend should be secure and should be able to run in a secure environment and PCI compliant environment
